evaluations.prompt: Check if my project at /Users/me/Projects/MyApp is ready to use as an Obsidian vault.
evaluations.expected_behavior: Agent runs init_vault.py with --validate-only flag. It reports findings without creating .obsidian/ or modifying .gitignore.

evaluations.prompt: Set up Obsidian for my project.
evaluations.expected_behavior: Agent checks prerequisites first (Obsidian app, obsidian-cli, ruamel.yaml) before running init. If prerequisites are missing, it reports what needs to be installed and waits for user confirmation.
Script reports no .md files found. Agent reports this to the user and asks whether to proceed anyway. Does NOT silently create .obsidian/ in an empty directory.
